text.message: Why start a game then leave lol

why dont you block them then
I mean u do that then u don’t block him so

And you guys want to get off free lol?
He has 2 ports he’ll be fine

I’m getting hit non stop while red and OJ
could not have been a luckier roll
Holy crap stop complaining I haven’t rolled one 7
